feed.title: Thunderbird Release Notes
feed.subtitle: Thunderbird Release Notes feed provides a simple way to keep up to date with Thunderbird releases.

entry.title: Thunderbird 140.13.0esr
entry.content:
Fixed

  • Security fixes

As always, you’re encouraged to tell us what you think, ask for help, or file a bug in Bugzilla

entry.title: Thunderbird 153.0esr
entry.content:
What’s New

  • Visual signatures can be added to PDF attachments opened in Thunderbird

  • 'Copy Message Link' and 'Copy News Link' added to header pane 'More actions'

  • Accessiblity is improved in various tree views

  • Added 'Archive' action to mail notifications

  • Add "Show Full Path" folder pane option for compact view modes

  • Unified folders now display account color indicator with account name tooltip

  • Folder copy enabled within mail server accounts and local folders

  • 'Reset Folder Order' option added to folder pane to reset custom folder sorting

  • Add `mail.useLocalizedFolderNames' to toggle special folder name localization

  • 'Favorites' added as destination for 'Move To' and 'File' buttons

  • Composer now shows a warning if user's configured OpenPGP key expires soon

  • Enabled configuration of preferred OpenPGP keyserver via the UI

  • Add mail.openpgp.load_untested_gpgme_version to load untested GPGME version

  • Added support for generating Unobtrusive Signatures (OpenPGP)

  • Implemented option to show only messages without any tag

  • Message body search enabled for OpenPGP and S/MIME encrypted messages

  • SecurityDevices enabled in enterprise policies

  • Enable support for DNS over HTTPS

  • OAuth login for mail accounts now opens in default web browser

  • Thundermail services can now be used without installing an add-on

  • OAuth responses now verify issuer fields and reject missing required issuers

  • Enable the "Sign in with Thundermail" button in Account Hub

  • Account hub is opened on the first run of Thunderbird

  • Account Hub email manual config option added

  • Enable Thundermail OAuth sign-in with account auto-configuration

  • Address book cards can be copied to the clipboard as vCard

  • Enable exporting selected address book cards

  • Custom Accent Color can be chosen in Appearance Settings

  • Enable support for Microsoft Exchange via Exchange Web Services

  • Calendar month/multiweek views are now scrollable with touch screen

  • Tasks can be sorted by created or modified date

  • PDF pages can be reorganized directly in the PDF viewer

Changed

  • 'Copy Message Location' removed from mail context menu

  • Read folders are now removed from Unread Folders view

  • Special folders are now localized based on a restricted set of names

  • OpenPGP public key no longer attached by default in signed-only messages

  • Address books are now created in Account Hub

  • Yahoo, AT&T, AOL accounts migrated to OAuth 2.0 with PKCE for improved security

  • GMail OAuth updated to use PKCE

  • Skype has been retired and therefore dropped from Address book IM selection

  • Removed pref default_supports_diskspace.{HOST}

  • Removed pref default_offline_support_level.{HOST}

  • Removed Odnoklassniki chat setup and directed users to XMPP configuration

  • Use of the string "Junk" has been replaced with "Spam"

  • Updated about:rights to replace local with hosted url

  • Stop shipping 32-bit Linux x86 binaries

  • 'Hide completed tasks' now also hides cancelled tasks

Fixed

  • Thunderbird could crash when parsing message state

  • The English string for the Angry emoji was incorrectly named as the Yell emoji

  • Notification sounds did not respect operating system's do-not-disturb mode

  • Non-English localized Thunderbird created English special folders on first start

  • Copying text from some error alerts was not possible

  • Fastmail CalDAV app password access failed due to forced OAuth regression

  • Thunderbird could crash in server subscription logic

  • Could not distinguish folders with same name in 'Recent Destinations' and 'Favorites'

  • Donation banner stole focus when Thunderbird was running in the background

  • Unknown command-line arguments passed to Thunderbird did not print warning

  • Thunderbird could crash when processing new incoming messages

  • Spam messages triggered new mail notifications before being moved to Spam folder

  • Web pages with bad certificates displayed as blank

  • Memory leak after opening New Window from folder pane context menu

  • Importing a vCard only displayed VCF files in the file picker

  • Calendar view tabs were not properly keyboard accessible

  • Ctrl+S did not save PDF attachments opened in Thunderbird tabs

  • TLS errors incorrectly reported all unknown failures as untrusted certificates

  • Thunderbird could crash when copying an empty list of messages

  • Incorrect roaming data directory caused regression on Windows and macOS

  • Changing to new drafts folder and then back did not correctly restore the folder

  • Message headers were re-downloaded at every startup

  • Old IMAP profile migration deleted INBOX and other mailbox files

  • 'Search Messages...' dialog could not be opened outside the email tab

  • Option did not exist to create new address book under File -> New

  • Newly created folder was missing under "Recent" when moving a message

  • Could not compose new message if the folder pane was empty

  • 'Delete' was missing from context menu when multiple IMAP folders were selected

  • Compacting multiple folders failed and did not compact

  • Shift-click for 'Edit' button in drafts header view did not work

  • "Replace All" in Compose did not update plain text until dialog closed

  • Status bar messages displayed unlocalized folder names or IMAP mailbox names

  • Saved email filenames were not not always cross-platform safe

  • Space bar did not scroll in PDF attachments opened from emails

  • Folder location widget used non-localised name

  • Empty confirmation dialog when more messages opened in tabs than mailnews.open_tab_warning

  • Removing tags from IMAP messages could fail and tags reappeared after refresh

  • Toggling dark message mode did not restore focus and scroll position

  • 'Show remote content' did not display remote content for EML message

  • Emoji sequences were not properly handled in subject lines

  • 'Delete' button in unified toolbar could delete attachments instead of message

  • "Repair text encoding" could duplicate recipient and attachments

  • Some IMAP emails showed current time instead of correct received date

  • Deleting a single message in folder using 'Group by Sort' failed after CTRL+A

  • New newsgroups were not added in alphabetical order by default

  • Sorting by threads only brought threads with unread top messages to the top

  • News message marked read after NNTP error prevented retrieval from server

  • 'Recent destinations' submenu was not sorted by time of modification

  • Account column could display incorrect account name

  • 'Tag' submenu of mail context menu could be populated incorrectly

  • Unified archive subfolders could show wrong names and no messages

  • Moving saved search/virtual folder under IMAP could fail

  • New Folder dialog allowed invalid folder creation without a selected parent folder

  • New/unread messages in collapsed thread were not obvious enough

  • Pressing Delete on Trash folder could remove it without confirmation

  • Renaming of a 'unified folder' created a duplicate

  • Clicking on a folder in the folder pane did not always open folder

  • Messages nested deeper than 255 levels disappeared from threading view

  • Performing Delete followed by Undo on thread parent message could corrupt view

  • Single messages still appeared collapsible after thread members were deleted

  • Updated threads remained misordered until folder refresh or resort

  • Global search failed to display inaccessible messages found in local folders

  • Numeric subfolders were sorted alphabetically instead of naturally

  • Virtual folder folder-picker showed unlabeled IM account as selectable folder

  • Some folders showed new mail count prior to receiving mail

  • Menu Bar -> View contained duplicate accelerator keys

  • Unified toolbar Spam button did not switch to "Not Spam" when spam message selected

  • Warning was not logged if mail.openpgp.alias_rules_file file did not exist

  • Not all headers were signed when creating digitally signed OpenPGP email

  • When configuring external GnuPG, user was not promted to import public key

  • "Open and Show" for OpenPGP-signed message (.eml) did not work

  • Invalidly signed unencrypted emails were indicated as worse than unsigned ones

  • Reason for revoked certificate was not shown

  • Apple Mail OpenPGP emails failed to decrypt due to hidden recipient key ID

  • OpenPGP import of public key with experimental packets failed with unclear error

  • Opening messages with OpenPGP keys was slow and blocked the UI for large keyrings

  • OpenPGP key refresh failed when fingerprint lookup returned multiple results

  • Encrypted Gmail CSE emails with outer opaque S/MIME were not readable

  • Invalid S/MIME encryption certificate caused misleading send errors

  • "Search Messages" search did not finish due to unparsable local folders

  • Search results showed older irrelevant emails before newer exact matches

  • Filter search on Body missed draft messages containing German umlauts

  • Esc cleared quick filter pin after changing folder

  • Thunderbird could crash during local message search

  • Replying could fail with mailnews.reply_quoting_selection.multi_word set false

  • Drag-drop of unselected contact inserted wrong or no email address

  • Changing identity in compose window caused modified draft not to be saved

  • Shift-click 'Compose Message To' on 'mailto' link did not open in plain text

  • Reply with selected text lost formatting for HTML messages containing </pre>

  • Multipart/related attachments were not preserved when editing or forwarding

  • Forwarded malformed MIME email had empty body and extra attachment

  • Message compose window was removed from Task Bar after saving as draft or template

  • Dragging email address between compose windows failed to add recipients

  • Thunderbird could crash when using Find and Replace All

  • Compose with PDF attachments opened PDFs instead of creating a new email

  • Multiple saves while using 'Options' -> 'Send a Copy' resulted in multiple copies

  • Search for "Attachment" in Settings menu did not find "Files and Attachments"

  • Add-on account creation did not work with Account Hub

  • Owl install did not show link to website in Account Hub

  • Username field did not appear in Account Hub when exchange authentication failed

  • Account Hub advanced config setup did not include default outgoing config

  • Disabled inputs could be toggled in Account Hub address book

  • Users could not disable spinning overlay in Account Hub for email

  • Account Hub local address book creation could continue with blank name

  • Account Hub email success messages were not always accurate about config source

  • Calendar/address book sections were shown in Account Hub when there were none

  • New password-based Exchange accounts failed to save passwords in login manager

  • Account hub showed connection security instead of actual authentication method

  • New identity dialog lacked reply-matching and end-to-end encryption settings

  • Thunderbird could fail to shut down cleanly during active OAuth requests

  • Account Hub kept OAuth selected after changing to hostname without OAuth support

  • Account Hub autodetect wrongly prompted for a password when auth was unavailable

  • Interrupted external OAuth2 setup required restarting Thunderbird

  • The default account could be reset after restart if uninitialized

  • Virtual folders did not update correctly for filtered POP3 messages

  • 'Copy Message to' action in a newsgroup filter did not work

  • Thunderbird could crash while importing mail thread

  • Thunderbird did not clearly fail when importing profile from a bad source

  • Thunderbird could not import profile located at the top level of zip file

  • 'Any Number' was unavailable in address book search with 'Match all of the following'

  • Contact not found in Advanced Address Book Search if phone number had a period

  • Thunderbird did not display contact photos in WebP format from CardDAV servers

  • Opening a vCard (.vcf) from file manager or CLI did not work in some cases

  • Redirected CardDAV URLs resolved relative URLs against the wrong host

  • Installations from Microsoft Store did not open when clicking 'mailto:' links

  • Windows new message notification click did not bring Thunderbird to foreground

  • Microsoft Store installs did not open when clicking 'news://' link or .eml file

  • Using thunderbird -compose with double quotes made last email address invalid

  • Clicking the backspace icon in the quick filter field cleared the input field

  • Subfolder kept stale accessibility unread count after unread messages were deleted

  • Moving virtual folder within maildir based IMAP or local folder could fail

  • Thunderbird could crash when completing folder copy/move

  • 'Edit as New Message' and inline 'Forward' not possible with PGP-signed messages

  • Various MIME improvements

  • Forwarding some Apple Mail messages incorrectly attached inline text as a file

  • Thunderbird could crash when marking all messages as read

  • Auto-compaction could corrupt database and cause crashes during syncs

  • 'news:' URIs without specific server had incorrect format displayed in status bar

  • 'Mark' -> 'All Read' affected newsgroup messages that had not been fetched yet

  • Thunderbird could not reconnect to newsgroups after connection loss until restarted

  • Sending a newsgroup post appeared successful when it had actually failed

  • Saving a new draft retained superceded version

  • Thunderbird hung when auto-checking multiple accounts for new messages

  • Spam not checked with mail.server.default.check_all_folders_for_new on

  • Startup could be slow with large number of folders not using subscriptions

  • Saved search in unified folder resulted in server error

  • Thunderbird did not report refused POP3 connection

  • Remove message body retention policy was not functional

  • POP3 could stop downloading mail until restart

  • With auto-mark-read disabled, large mail still marked as read during load delay

  • IMAP "Show only subscribed folders" could not be changed without restart

  • POP3 deadlocked when server went silent without closing socket

  • Thunderbird could crash when mail folder was renamed or moved

  • NNTP server with invalid TLS certificate could not be added to certificate exceptions

  • Cancelled message send could not be retried and hung with SMTP timeout errors

  • Corrupted NNTP account data caused excessive memory use and startup crash

  • Multiple selected IMAP folders could not be moved or deleted together

  • Non-Latin IMAP keywords were lowercased and encoded incorrectly as MUTF-7

  • Message tags were lost when moving folder from local folder to IMAP folder

  • Removing a chat account threw an exception and failed to clear the UI

  • Enterprise policy use not indicated in about:preferences with link to about:policies

  • Language field in settings was empty after restart in Troubleshoot Mode

  • Primary Password policy was detected but not enforced for saved account passwords

  • Archived RSS feed messages were sent to the archive folder of default identity

  • Broken feed icon could prevent updating of feeds

  • Task reminders could fail for tasks without end dates or with shifted due dates

  • Calendar did not alert user for connection issues

  • Copying one recurring event occurrence failed to set the date when pasted

  • Could not copy an event in multiweek or month view by drag-and-drop

  • Duplicate attendees were added to invitations instead of being filtered out

  • Calendar discovery with certificate error displayed multiple exceptions

  • It was not possible to create date-only all-day tasks

  • Task percentage complete was not preserved separately from status in tooltips

  • Calendar invites were incorrectly marked processed after calendar sync completed

  • ICS event comments were not displayed in Thunderbird event details

  • Dismissed Gmail calendar reminder did nothing and item stayed visible

  • iCal imports misread unknown timezones as GMT, creating events at wrong times

  • Could not export local calendar as HTML

  • Cancelled filter edit dialog closed the message filter dialog

  • Visual and UX improvements

As always, you’re encouraged to tell us what you think, ask for help, or file a bug in Bugzilla

entry.title: Thunderbird 153.0
entry.content:
What’s New

  • Unified folders now display account color indicator with account name tooltip

  • OAuth login for mail accounts now opens in default web browser

  • Thundermail services can now be used without installing an add-on

  • OAuth responses now verify issuer fields and reject missing required issuers

Changed

  • Removed Odnoklassniki chat setup and directed users to XMPP configuration

Fixed

  • Ctrl+S did not save PDF attachments opened in Thunderbird tabs

  • TLS errors incorrectly reported all unknown failures as untrusted certificates

  • Thunderbird could crash during shutdown

  • Thunderbird could crash when copying an empty list of messages

  • New mail alerts incorrectly sized or positioned on some multi-monitor setups

  • Old IMAP profile migration deleted INBOX and other mailbox files

  • Space bar did not scroll in PDF attachments opened from emails

  • 'Search Messages' shortcut (Ctrl+Shift+F) failed in standalone message window

  • Folder location widget used non-localised name

  • Empty confirmation dialog when more messages opened in tabs than mailnews.open_tab_warning

  • Removing tags from IMAP messages could fail and tags reappeared after refresh

  • Folder pane could not be horizontally resized in additional 3-pane tabs

  • Global search failed to display inaccessible messages found in local folders

  • Numeric subfolders were sorted alphabetically instead of naturally

  • Virtual folder folder-picker showed unlabeled IM account as selectable folder

  • Virtual folders failed to preserve the online search setting

  • Apple Mail OpenPGP emails failed to decrypt due to hidden recipient key ID

  • OpenPGP import of public key with experimental packets failed with unclear error

  • Performance issue when decrypting encrypted messages

  • Opening messages with OpenPGP keys was slow and blocked the UI for large keyrings

  • OpenPGP key refresh failed when fingerprint lookup returned multiple results

  • Invalid S/MIME encryption certificate caused misleading send errors

  • Esc cleared quick filter pin after changing folder

  • Dragging email address between compose windows failed to add recipients

  • Thunderbird could crash when using Find and Replace All

  • Sending Message dialog got stuck on "Filter complete." after successful send

  • Compose with PDF attachments opened PDFs instead of creating a new email

  • Attachments opened via -compose on Windows could use incorrect filenames

  • Ctrl+Enter opened attachment instead of sending the message

  • Compose window remained open when delayed sending was enabled

  • Account hub showed connection security instead of actual authentication method

  • Account Hub GSSAPI autoconfiguration incorrectly prompted for a password

  • New identity dialog lacked reply-matching and end-to-end encryption settings

  • Account Hub manual EWS setup lacked OAuth authentication option

  • Thunderbird could fail to shut down cleanly during active OAuth requests

  • Account Hub kept OAuth selected after changing to hostname without OAuth support

  • Account Hub showed a false error when returning from EWS manual configuration

  • Account Hub autodetect wrongly prompted for a password when auth was unavailable

  • QR exports with SMTP passwords generated invalid data for Thunderbird for Android

  • Message Filters 'Run Now' button remained disabled after filter run or mail check

  • Redirected CardDAV URLs resolved relative URLs against the wrong host

  • Thunderbird could crash when completing folder copy/move

  • Forwarding some Apple Mail messages incorrectly attached inline text as a file

  • Auto-compaction could corrupt database and cause crashes during syncs

  • NNTP server with invalid TLS certificate could not be added to certificate exceptions

  • Sent message in EWS account showed message as unread in the sent items folder

  • EWS NTLM authentication triggered login failures despite successful syncs

  • Saving inline Exchange images used incorrect filenames and file types

  • Cancelled message send could not be retried and hung with SMTP timeout errors

  • EWS folders failed to show new mail notifications until the folder was selected

  • Corrupted NNTP account data caused excessive memory use and startup crash

  • Multiple selected IMAP folders could not be moved or deleted together

  • Non-Latin IMAP keywords were lowercased and encoded incorrectly as MUTF-7

  • Message tags were lost when moving folder from local folder to IMAP folder

  • Reply All button was missing for some EWS messages with multiple recipients

  • EWS users could not permanently delete individual Trash messages

  • Removing a chat account threw an exception and failed to clear the UI

  • Primary Password policy was detected but not enforced for saved account passwords

  • Copying one recurring event occurrence failed to set the date when pasted

  • Calendar invites were incorrectly marked processed after calendar sync completed

  • ICS event comments were not displayed in Thunderbird event details

  • Visual and UX improvements

  • Security fixes

As always, you’re encouraged to tell us what you think, ask for help, or file a bug in Bugzilla

entry.title: Thunderbird 140.12.1esr
entry.content:
Fixed

  • Security fixes

As always, you’re encouraged to tell us what you think, ask for help, or file a bug in Bugzilla

entry.title: Thunderbird 152.0.1
entry.content:
Fixed

  • Reply All button was missing for some EWS messages with multiple recipients

  • Security fixes

As always, you’re encouraged to tell us what you think, ask for help, or file a bug in Bugzilla

entry.title: Thunderbird 140.12.0esr
entry.content:
Fixed

  • Security fixes

As always, you’re encouraged to tell us what you think, ask for help, or file a bug in Bugzilla

entry.title: Thunderbird 152.0
entry.content:
What’s New

  • SecurityDevices enabled in enterprise policies

  • One-click account setup for Thundermail accounts

Changed

  • Use 'Add' instead of 'New' for account, calendar, address book creation buttons

  • GMail OAuth updated to use PKCE

  • Mail server hostname also checked when detecting address books and calendars

  • Updated about:rights to replace local with hosted url

  • 'Hide completed tasks' now also hides cancelled tasks

Fixed

  • New mail alerts appeared on wrong monitor in three-monitor setup

  • Spam messages triggered new mail notifications before being moved to Spam folder

  • Filtered IMAP or NNTP subscriptions were lost after closing Subscribe dialog

  • 'Download Headers' dialog for newsgroups failed to open

  • Messages nested deeper than 255 levels disappeared from threading view

  • Performing Delete followed by Undo on thread parent message could corrupt view

  • Single messages still appeared collapsible after thread members were deleted

  • Updated threads remained misordered until folder refresh or resort

  • Non-threaded subject sorting separated 'RE:' replies from original messages

  • BCC recipients were included in signed email headers

  • Filter search on Body missed draft messages containing German umlauts

  • Thunderbird could crash during local message search

  • Blocked file warning showed without 'Unblock File' button in compose window

  • Forwarding/Redirecting Exchange messages failed with NS_ERROR_OUT_OF_MEMORY

  • Compose window closed early and send progress dialog hung after NNTP failure

  • Compose window stayed open after sending when mailnews.sendInBackground set

  • Microsoft OAuth2 failed when HTTPS localhost redirect was not intercepted

  • Pasting contact photos stopped working when photo button had focus

  • Filter dialog lacked focus ring and had poorly distinguishable buttons

  • Subfolder kept stale accessibility unread count after unread messages were deleted

  • 'Edit as New Message' and inline 'Forward' not possible with PGP-signed messages

  • Various MIME improvements

  • EWS messages could go missing from folder view

  • IMAP "Show only subscribed folders" could not be changed without restart

  • Unable to delete more than 1000 messages at a time on Microsoft 365

  • EWS folders in Trash were moved to Trash again instead of being hard deleted

  • IMAP notifications repeated for emails read on another device after sleep wake

  • POP3 deadlocked when server went silent without closing socket

  • Calendar acceptance no longer distinguished between single occurrence and series

  • Transparent popups on macOS made calendar event editing difficult

  • Duplicate attendees were added to invitations instead of being filtered out

  • Task percentage complete was not preserved separately from status in tooltips

  • Visual and UX improvements

  • Security fixes

As always, you’re encouraged to tell us what you think, ask for help, or file a bug in Bugzilla

entry.title: Thunderbird 140.11.1esr
entry.content:
Changed

  • There are no Thunderbird changes requiring release notes in this release

As always, you’re encouraged to tell us what you think, ask for help, or file a bug in Bugzilla

entry.title: Thunderbird 151.0.1
entry.content:
Fixed

  • Forwarding/Redirecting Exchange messages failed with NS_ERROR_OUT_OF_MEMORY

As always, you’re encouraged to tell us what you think, ask for help, or file a bug in Bugzilla

entry.title: Thunderbird 140.11.0esr
entry.content:
Fixed

  • Security fixes

As always, you’re encouraged to tell us what you think, ask for help, or file a bug in Bugzilla
